text:
miwi        2010-06-06 08:37:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-mongoengine Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  MongoEngine is an ORM-like layer on top of PyMongo. It allows you to define
  schemas for documents and query collections using syntax inspired by the
  Django ORM.
  
  WWW:    http://hmarr.com/mongoengine/
  
  PR:             ports/147465
  Submitted by:   Mirko Zinn <mail at derzinn.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3962    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-mongoengine/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/py-mongoengine/pkg-descr (new)
